title: US announces charges against former Cuban President Raúl Castro over 1996 shootdown of planes
full_text:
US announces charges against former Cuban President Raúl Castro over 1996 shootdown of planes
US announces charges against former Cuban President Raúl Castro over 1996 shootdown of planes
ByThe Associated Press
May 20, 2026, 1:36 PM
MIAMI -- US announces charges against former Cuban President Raúl Castro over 1996 shootdown of planes.
